names.name: Arunothai Kuan Im Holy Mother Shrine
Arunothai Guanyin Holy Mother Shrine

description.div: The entrance to Arunothai village is marked by a city gate. A similar gate can be found in Reshuitang.
The entrance to Arunothai village is marked by a city gate. A similar gate can be found in Reshuitang.
The Sansheng Miao in Arunothai. Women are not allowed to enter the temple.
A cemetery in the south of Arunothai.
A cemetery in the west of Mae Salong.
The Tiger Temple in Mae Salong
A mixed Thai-Chinese temple in Mae Salong.
